args.query: SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS total_sales FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON oi.OrderId = o.Id WHERE o.EffectiveDate BETWEEN '2022-06-25' AND '2022-11-25' GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS total_sales FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON oi.OrderId = o.Id WHERE o.EffectiveDate BETWEEN '2022-06-25' AND '2022-11-25' GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 1;
